creator: tuco.xyz@gmail.com
text:
On 8/6/10, Chip Camden <sterling@camdensoftware.com> wrote:
> Looks like this one should just be closed (or purged, if there is such a
> thing) without applying any changes.

Sorry my last mail was lost. What I said is that only the sys/ part of
my patch is wrong. I sent a new patch (see last attachment) without
the sys/ bits, and I also verified that it doesn't break with make
buildworld.

Please consider my last patch, it would help making code more portable
for projects like Debian GNU/kFreeBSD, which rely heavily on FreeBSD
and give back to FreeBSD community (see for example linprocfs
improvements in
http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=kern/149012).

Thanks!
